subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-04 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: I heard that here they have had a great religious procession with much pomp and ceremony: a procession the likes of which was not seen before.
subcodes.first_line_orig: در نیویورک کاردینالی بود و اعلان می کرد که این دشمن مسیح است، آمده که دین مسیح را محو کند
subcodes.subjects: @the Christian clergy, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering; rejection of Christ
